articles.description: They defended 170 with ease against South Africa and will now face Australia in the final at Lord's on Sunday

articles.title: ‘He's the one who implemented…’ - Mithali Raj lauds Jay Shah's contribution to women's cricket, praises initiatives for players' welfare
articles.description: Speaking in an interview, Mithali reflected on how women's cricket has evolved over the years and pointed out that modern-day cricketers now have far greater support than previous generations.

articles.title: 'T20 as a sport is here to stay' - Ravichandran Ashwin backs ETPL as cricket eyes 2028 Olympics
articles.description: Ashwin also expressed doubts about the future of ODI cricket while calling on ETPL franchises to make cricket a global force ahead of 2028.

articles.title: Pathum Nissanka misses LPL 2026 after wrist surgery, India Tests in doubt
articles.description: The LPL 2026 concludes on August 8, just seven days before India's two-Test series in Sri Lanka kicks off on Saturday, August 15, leaving Nissanka a narrow recovery window.
